fields.value: true if the font contains COLR color layer data; otherwise, false.

fields.value: true if the font contains PNG color bitmap images; otherwise, false.

fields.value: true if the font contains SVG color glyph descriptions; otherwise, false.

fields.value: true if the font contains a CPAL color palette table; otherwise, false.
